description:
Berlin-based R&D grant. Typical awards €50–200k for innovative tech startups.

**Steps after incorporation:**
1. Contact IBB / Berlin Partner for scoping call
2. Adapt meta/zim-projektskizze-draft.md for Pro FIT format
3. Submit to next batch

**References:** Taledo, doctorly, Deep Neuron Lab received Pro FIT funding.

status.comment: Inquiry email drafted (meta/applications/inquiry-ibb-pro-fit.md). Send after UG exists.
